query:

  (876010, 421845, 'Golf VX AH – Membership Giveaway', '/membershipgiveaway', 0, 0, '[]', 0, 0, '2026-01-08 10:09:13', '2026-01-29 04:01:46', NOW()),

  (883349, 421845, 'Golf VX AH — Drive Day (Public)', '/drive-day', 0, 0, '[{"id":123589,"name":"PBGA","color":"#EEEEEE"},{"id":123590,"name":"Drive Day","color":"#EEEEEE"}]', 0, 0, '2026-01-21 08:46:21', '2026-02-18 10:31:19', NOW()),
  (885917, 421845, 'PBGA Junior Summer Camp', '/summer-camp', 0, 0, '[{"id":123589,"name":"PBGA","color":"#EEEEEE"},{"id":123889,"name":"Summer Camp","color":"#EEEEEE"}]', 0, 0, '2026-01-25 04:15:25', '2026-02-21 02:55:34', NOW()),
  (888788, 421845, 'Golf VX AH - Annual Membership Giveaway | Q1 2026', '/anniversary', 0, 0, '[{"id":124327,"name":"Giveaway","color":"#EEEEEE"},{"id":124328,"name":"Annual Giveaway","color":"#EEEEEE"},{"id":124329,"name":"Q1","color":"#EEEEEE"}]', 70, 0, '2026-01-29 07:47:56', '2026-02-20 22:29:57', NOW()),

  tags = VALUES(tags),
  last_synced_at = NOW();
